response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content; identified as a 3D comedy skit featuring Hololive English -Justice-. 2. Identified '99' by Mob Choir in a short clip around 01:44. 3. Used web search to confirm song title, original artist, and retrieve lyrics for '99'. 4. Verified that 'Above Below' and 'Renegade' are referenced in text but not performed as vocal songs in the video. 5. Mapped scenes based on skit segments and musical breaks.
response.global_summary: The video is a humorous skit featuring the Hololive English -Justice- VTuber group. The group members conduct an 'interrogation' and 'firearms training' scenario, incorporating clips from their various streams, including the song '99' by Mob Choir (used as a meme/gag track) and their original songs 'Above Below' and 'Renegade'. No live musical performance takes place.

scenes.description: The members of Hololive English -Justice- (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, Raora Panthera) appear in a 3D interrogation skit, joking about photos and a bra found on a camera. Background music is light, instrumental suspense/comedy music.
A short, meme-like skit clip plays, featuring the song '99' by Mob Choir. Text on screen reads 'Q. How was the interrogation?'.

scenes.description: The skit continues with further humorous interrogation questions and responses, followed by a transition to 'Firearms Training' which appears as a parody video introduction with instrumental background music.
The group members are in a 3D environment for 'Firearms Training', talking through rules and performing funny skits. No vocal songs are playing, only background instrumental music.
The video concludes with a short parody graphic and outro, featuring only instrumental music.
